label: Target folder
description: Destination directory for the rendered Markdown files. Pick a writable folder; it will be created if it doesn't exist.

label: Group by template
description: When on, each template's items go under <target>/<template-stem>/. Items with a wiki.path that contains a slash override this routing.

label: Overwrite existing files
description: When off, existing .md files at the destination are skipped (no clobber).

label: Keep frontmatter when no plugin block
description: When off (default), items whose rendered markdown has no plugins.wikiwonder block get their frontmatter stripped — most wiki engines ignore YAML frontmatter and it's just noise. When on, the original rendered (PDF-shaped) frontmatter is kept verbatim.
